title: linnaeopsis alba
intro: Linnaeopsis alba, also known as the white linnaeopsis, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as citrus or rue family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Linnaeopsis alba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
